metadata.description: Security guardrails for Claude Code. Secret scanning, vulnerability detection, action guarding, config shielding, audit logging, package supply-chain gating, egress monitoring, prompt-injection canaries, and capability fencing.

plugins.name: full
plugins.description: Meta-plugin. One install pulls in all 9 Hydra plugins via dependency resolution.

plugins.name: secret-scanner
plugins.description: Real-time secret detection in written files. 200+ patterns, Shannon entropy, Aho-Corasick matching.

plugins.name: vuln-detector
plugins.description: OWASP Top 10 and CWE-mapped vulnerability detection in code changes.

plugins.name: action-guard
plugins.description: Pre-execution classification and blocking of dangerous Bash commands.

plugins.name: config-shield
plugins.description: Session-start scanning for malicious repository configuration files.

plugins.name: audit-trail
plugins.description: Comprehensive security event logging with rotation and reporting. Includes audit-verify skill for HMAC hash-chain tamper-evidence inspection.

plugins.name: package-gate
plugins.description: PreToolUse advisory hook on npm/pip/uv/cargo/go/gem install. Five risk signals: existence, age, maintainer churn, typosquat (Levenshtein), download cliff. 24h URL-hash cache. Closes the supply-chain pre-install gap.

plugins.name: egress-monitor
plugins.description: PostToolUse advisory hook logging every WebFetch/WebSearch/Bash-network destination to append-only NDJSON. First-seen domains surface as stderr advisories.

plugins.name: canary
plugins.description: Prompt-injection canary harness. Seeds per-session high-entropy tokens into WebFetch advisories; PostToolUse scan flags canary leakage in subsequent tool inputs/outputs as evidence of indirect injection.

plugins.name: capability-fence
plugins.description: Best-effort subagent-escape detection. PreToolUse hook compares the invoked tool against the active skill's allowed-tools frontmatter; logs out-of-lane invocations. Observability only — runtime sandboxing requires harness/SDK work.
